## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Problem

What failure mode, weakness, or gap does this change address?

## Why this change

Why is this the right fix now?

## Files changed

List the main files touched.

- 
- 
- 

## Expected behavior change

What should the skill do better after this change?

## Eval impact

- Added eval:
- Updated eval:
- No eval change because:

## Risks / possible regressions

What might this change worsen or accidentally break?

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused change
- [ ] Changelog updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Eval added/updated if fixing a real failure mode
- [ ] Commit message is specific
